title: Indulgent Creamy American Macaroni Casserole
description: A winey, gooey, lazy-sunday american dish featuring milk and plant-based friendly ingredients, perfect for a comforting meal.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Cook the macaroni according to the package instructions until al dente.
In a medium saucepan, melt the vegan butter over medium heat.
Add the flour and whisk to combine, cooking for 1 minute.
Slowly pour in the milk, whisking constantly to avoid lumps.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook until it thickens, stirring occasionally.
Remove the sauce from the heat and stir in the nutritional yeast, salt, and pepper.
Add the white wine and stir to combine.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the cooked macaroni, sauce, and plant-based cheddar shreds.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish and top with additional plant-based cheddar shreds if desired.
